scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.db:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d postgres
scripts.db:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml stop postgres
scripts.db:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml logs -f --tail=200 postgres
scripts.db:ps: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml ps postgres
